goal: 批次1：更新AI模型列表（同步P-01合规）+ 引入Playwright E2E自动测试框架（截图、日志、点击测试），为后续迭代提供测试验证能力

coverage_checklist.model_list_updated_openai: assert: AI_MODELS.openai 包含 GPT-5.4 和 GPT-4.1，移除已废弃的 GPT-4.5
coverage_checklist.model_list_updated_claude: assert: AI_MODELS.claude 包含 Opus 4.7 和 Haiku 4.5
coverage_checklist.model_list_updated_google: assert: 新增 AI_MODELS.google 含 Gemini 2.5 Pro 和 Flash
coverage_checklist.model_list_updated_vision: assert: VISION_MODELS 扩展包含 OpenAI Vision 和 Claude Vision
coverage_checklist.welcome_synced: assert: Welcome.tsx 的模型选项与 constants.ts 同步
coverage_checklist.settings_synced: assert: Settings.tsx 的模型选项与 constants.ts 同步
coverage_checklist.types_synced: assert: types.ts 的 provider union 包含 'google'
coverage_checklist.playwright_installed: assert: package.json 包含 @playwright/test 依赖
coverage_checklist.smoke_test_exists: assert: scripts/e2e/smoke.test.ts 存在且包含启动、截图、点击测试
